confirmed_findings.rationale: User input is concatenated directly into the SQL query string without parameterization, allowing SQL injection.
confirmed_findings.summary: SQL injection in user lookup query

needs_more_info.info_requested: Confirm whether the auth guard is enforced upstream before this handler.
needs_more_info.rationale: The review comment flags a possible missing auth check but the call site is ambiguous.

rejected_findings.rationale: Pre-existing test-suite debt unrelated to the reviewed diff.
